instructions.name: claim_daily_salary
docs: El usuario reclama su sueldo, calculado dinámicamente.
El impuesto de protocolo está hard-capped al 1% para limitar capture.

instructions.name: forge_nft
docs: [HOOK] La Forja: Permitirá fusionar NFTs en el futuro

instructions.name: oracle_record_match
docs: Records a real match played by a player (idempotent per fixture + player).
First call drains stamina by STAMINA_DRAIN_PER_MATCH. Repeated calls are no-op.

instructions.name: oracle_reset_season
docs: Cuando comienza un nuevo torneo (Copa América, Euro, etc.), el Oráculo
"revive" a los jugadores eliminados y reinicia su Yield Base inicial.

instructions.name: oracle_update_player_yield
docs: El Oráculo (Pyth/Helius) reporta acciones del Mundial en tiempo real.

errors.name: InvalidWagerWinner
errors.msg: Winner token account does not match the declared wager winner

errors.name: PresaleLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Presale contribution exceeds max per user

errors.name: UseRefundForCancelledFixture
errors.msg: Cancelled fixtures must be refunded, not claimed

errors.name: ScoreUpdateCooldown
errors.msg: Contributor score update is in cooldown

fields.name: market_id
docs: Stable market identifier used for PDA derivation (0-255).
